calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar May-16-2012 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-16-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is present. Represented by Harry wood.
Attorney Tony Ruch appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Rosalie Santiago is present.
Attorney Dakora Whitney representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem James Watson , litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of May-21-2012 is vacated. (501/JPT)
